title: PBK Pack Of 50 Bagasse Large Box (9x6 Inch), 900ml, Biodegradable, Compostable And Disposable Takeaway Food Containers (9" x 6" - 50 Pack)
features: ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY MATERIAL: Be environmentally conscious with our boxes! These boxes are made from bagasse which is a renewable material that decomposes over time.
PACK OF 50 - This product comes in a pack of 50 boxes, which is a good amount for any event.

VERSATILE: Our boxes are microwave safe, BPA free, and sustainable for both freezer and refrigerator storage, making them versatile for all your storage needs. These boxes can also store either hot, cold, wet or oily foods without leaking.
description: Are you hosting an event and need a reliable, eco-friendly solution for serving food? Look no further than our 50 x Clamshell Large Boxes. These 9x6 inch biodegradable and disposable takeaway containers are designed to meet your food storage needs while being kind to the environment. Made from high-quality bagasse, a sustainable byproduct of sugarcane processing, our boxes are a perfect alternative to traditional plastic containers. They are durable and reliable, ideal for storing a variety of foods, whether hot, cold, or wet, ensuring your food stays fresh and intact. Perfect for parties, picnics, corporate gatherings, food trucks, restaurants, and caterers looking for an eco-conscious packaging solution, these boxes are simple and convenient to use—just place your food inside, close the lid, and lock it with the two tabs to seal your food securely. Measuring 9x6 inches and weighing 30 grams, our large boxes are microwave safe, BPA free, and sustainable for both freezer and refrigerator storage, making them versatile for all your storage needs. Enhance your event with our 50 x Clamshell Large Boxes – the eco-friendly choice for disposable food storage. Order now and make a positive impact on the environment while enjoying the convenience and quality of our biodegradable containers.
